hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_RESULT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.css || "$FILE" == *.html ]]; then cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_RESULT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.css || "$FILE" == *.html ]]; then cd /home/user/stack-ia-creador && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
